sources.label: Ekinops newsroom (latest PR May 18, 2026 - nothing since June 6)

verdicts.rankRationale: Yesterday's down-move already reconciled the displayed rank with the adjusted score (now rank 34), and there is zero new company news since June 6; today's -3.66% drift on a EUR 100M micro-cap does not change the scaling-page setup, so hold.
verdicts.bull: Q1 2026 showed a second straight quarter of sequential growth (+8% to 27.6m EUR), and the March tier-1 European operator WDM MoU plus upcoming DCI/SASE deliveries give an under-owned EUR 100M optical name real bottleneck-adjacent optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Thesis intact but stale: no press release since May 18, next earnings July 28, and the stock is digesting a +58% YTD run; today's -3.66% modestly trims the crowding penalty without adding evidence either way.
verdicts.bear: A +58% YTD rerating on a micro-cap with only single-digit FY26 revenue growth guidance leaves little residual alpha if the tier-1 MoU fails to convert into firm orders, and liquidity is thin enough that flow alone can unwind the move.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Conversion of the tier-1 European operator WDM MoU into a firm contract, and first DCI/SASE deliveries flagged for end-2026 (next checkpoint: H1 results July 28, 2026).
verdicts.primaryRisk: Post-rerating micro-cap crowding: +58% YTD against single-digit growth guidance means any MoU slippage or soft H1 print triggers an outsized unwind.
